condicion_using:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.organization_id = appointments.organization_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.organization_id = organizations.id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role])))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (schedule_templates st
     JOIN organization_members om ON ((st.organization_id = om.organization_id)))
  WHERE ((st.id = schedule_template_items.template_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role])))))

((organization_id IS NOT NULL) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.organization_id = schedule_templates.organization_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role]))))))

((organization_id IS NULL) OR (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.organization_id = schedule_templates.organization_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid())))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM organization_members om
  WHERE ((om.organization_id = staff.organization_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role])))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (staff s
     JOIN organization_members om ON ((s.organization_id = om.organization_id)))
  WHERE ((s.id = staff_date_overrides.staff_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role])))))

(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (staff s
     JOIN organization_members om ON ((s.organization_id = om.organization_id)))
  WHERE ((s.id = staff_schedules.staff_id) AND (om.user_id = auth.uid()) AND (om.role = ANY (ARRAY['admin'::app_role, 'owner'::app_role])))))
